case_title: CARPENTERS 46 NORTHERN CALIFORNIA COUNTIES VS. OLSON CEILING SYSTEM, INC. et al

docket_entries.description: MINI-MINUTES FOR NOV-15-2006 9:30 AM FOR DEPT 301
SUBSTITUTION OF ATTORNEY ANSARI, KATHLEEN S. FOR RESPONDENT OLSON CEILING SYSTEM, INC FILED BY RESPONDENT OLSON CEILING SYSTEM, INC.

PETITION TO CONFIRM ARBITRATION AWARD FILED BY PETITIONER CARPENTERS 46 NORTHERN CALIFORNIA COUNTIES CONFERENCE BOARD ON BEHALF OF ITSELF AND ON BEHALF OF NORTHERN CALIFORNIA CARPENTERS REGIONAL COUNCIL AS TO RESPONDENT OLSON CEILING SYSTEM, INC. DOES 1-10, INCLUSIVE JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED

PROOF OF SERVICE OF NOTICE OF HEARING; PETITION TO CONFIRM ARB AWARD; INDEX OF FEDERAL AUTHORITIES; MEMO OF P&A IN SUPPORT OF PLTF'S ATTCHMENT APPLICATIONS AGAINST THE DEF'S; DECLARATION OF KRISTINA L. HILLMAN FILED BY PETITIONER CARPENTERS 46 NORTHERN CALIFORNIA COUNTIES CONFERENCE BOARD ON BEHALF OF ITSELF AND ON BEHALF OF NORTHERN CALIFORNIA CARPENTERS REGIONAL COUNCIL SERVED SEP-28-2006, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO RESPONDENT OLSON CEILING SYSTEM, INC.

LAW AND MOTION 301, PETITIONER CARPENTERS 46 NORTHERN CALIFORNIA COUNTIES' PETITION TO CONFIRM ARBITRATION AWARD IS GRANTED. NO OPPOSITION FILED. THE COURT RECEIVED THE PROPOSED FORM OF ORDER AND RESPONDENT WILL HAVE TIME ALLOWED BY STATUTE TO REVIEW. JUDGE: PETER J. BUSCH, REPORTER: CAROL KAREN, CSR 8189

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PETITIONER CARPENTERS 46 NORTHERN CALIFORNIA COUNTIES CONFERENCE BOARD ON BEHALF OF ITSELF AND ON BEHALF OF NORTHERN CALIFORNIA CARPENTERS REGIONAL COUNCIL RECOVER FROM RESPONDENT OLSON CEILING SYSTEM, INC. $15,530.50 PRINCIPAL, $1,237.50 ATTORNEY FEES, $434.50 COSTS, $300.00 FOR ITS SHARE OF COST OF ARBITRATION PROCEEDING, TOTAL JUDGMENT $17,502.50, SEE SCANNED DOC

calendar.matters:
Notice Of Hearing On Petition To Confirm Arbitration Award
Off Calendar Nov-15-2006 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Conchita Lozano-Batista of Weinberg Roger & Rosenfeld, 510-337-1001, appearing for petitioner and moving party
Kathleen S. Ansari of the Ansari Law Group, 408-920-2650, appearing via Court Call for respondent and opposing party

Respondent requested a continuance of the matter and the request was denied. The Court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: PETITIONER CARPENTERS 46 NORTHERN CALIFORNIA COUNTIES' Petition To Confirm Arbitration Award is granted. No opposition filed. The Court received the proposed form of order and respondent will have time allowed by statute to review. (301/PJB) Judge: Peter J. Busch, Reporter: Carol Karen, CSR 8189
